input.claim: AMD reported first-quarter revenue of $10.3 billion and said Data Center revenue rose 57% year over year.
input.evidence_span: SANTA CLARA, Calif., May 05, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- AMD (NASDAQ:AMD) today announced financial results for the first quarter of 2026. First quarter revenue was $10.3 billion, gross margin was 53%, operating income was $1.5 billion, net income was $1.4 billion and diluted earnings per share was $0.84. On a non-GAAP (*) basis, gross margin was 55%, operating income was $2.5 billion, net income was $2.3 billion and diluted earnings per share was $1.37.
input.evidence_title: AMD Reports First Quarter 2026 Financial Results

label.supports_claim_part: The span supports the company-level revenue figure but not the Data Center segment growth.

repair.why: Real paragraph span collected before training citation verifier repair v0.3.

input.claim: AMD expected second-quarter 2026 revenue to be about $11.2 billion and non-GAAP gross margin to be 58%.
input.evidence_span: For the second quarter of 2026, AMD expects revenue to be approximately $11.2 billion, plus or minus $300 million. The mid-point of the revenue range represents year-over-year growth of approximately 46% and a sequential increase of approximately 9%. Non-GAAP gross margin is expected to be approximately 56%.
input.evidence_title: AMD Reports First Quarter 2026 Financial Results

label.supports_claim_part: The span supports the revenue guidance but states a different gross-margin expectation.

provenance.anchor: For the second quarter of 2026, AMD expects revenue to be approximately $11.2 billion

repair.why: Real paragraph span collected before training citation verifier repair v0.3.

input.claim: Microsoft Cloud revenue was $54.5 billion and Azure revenue increased 40%.
input.evidence_span: Microsoft Cloud revenue was $54.5 billion and increased 29% (up 25% in constant currency), and commercial remaining performance obligation increased 99% to $627 billion.
input.evidence_title: Microsoft FY26 Q3 Press Release and Webcast

label.supports_claim_part: The span supports Microsoft Cloud revenue, but not Azure growth.

repair.why: Real paragraph span collected before training citation verifier repair v0.3.

input.evidence_span: Operating income was $38.4 billion and increased 20% (up 16% in constant currency)
input.evidence_title: Microsoft FY26 Q3 Press Release and Webcast

label.supports_claim_part: The operating income span does not establish Microsoft Cloud revenue.

repair.why: Real paragraph span collected before training citation verifier repair v0.3.

input.claim: Micron fiscal Q3 revenue was $41.46 billion and adjusted free cash flow was $18.3 billion.
input.evidence_span: Revenue of $41.46 billion versus $23.86 billion for the prior quarter and $9.30 billion for the same period last year
input.evidence_title: Micron Reports Record Results for Fiscal Q3 2026

label.supports_claim_part: The span supports revenue but not adjusted free cash flow.

provenance.fallback_note: Micron IR page repeatedly timed out during scripted collection; used the issuer press-release mirror on GlobeNewswire.

repair.why: Real paragraph span collected before training citation verifier repair v0.3.

input.claim: Micron said HBM4 was in high-volume shipments and HBM4E volume production had already started.
input.evidence_span: HBM4, built on 1-beta DRAM technology, is in high-volume shipments for our lead customer's platform, and qualification samples have been shipped to multiple end-customers.
input.evidence_title: Micron Reports Record Results for Fiscal Q3 2026

label.supports_claim_part: The span supports HBM4 shipments but says HBM4E volume production is expected later.

provenance.anchor: HBM4, built on 1-beta DRAM technology, is in high-volume shipments

input.claim: NVIDIA Data Center revenue was $75.2 billion and Edge Computing revenue was $6.4 billion.
input.evidence_span: Record Data Center revenue of $75.2 billion, up 92% from a year ago
input.evidence_title: NVIDIA Announces Financial Results for First Quarter Fiscal 2027

label.supports_claim_part: The span supports Data Center revenue but not Edge Computing revenue.
